About

An engineer who runs the room.

I'm a Technical Program Manager with an electrical engineering and robotics foundation, trained at Pitt and Cornell. I've sharpened my skills at frontier research organisations like Meta Reality Labs and by running an Indy Autonomous Challenge team.

My edge is bridging the gap between research engineers and operational reality. I build the infrastructure, tooling, and processes that let teams ship harder work, faster.

UK and US citizen. Bilingual in English and French. Currently between Johannesburg and London.
